    Other Operations

  • Comuniqué from the Ministry of Foreign Affairs Cuba Ministry of Foreign Affairs 04 Mar 2026 -- The Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Cuba rejects in the strongest terms the arbitrary and unjustified decision by the government of Ecuador to expel all personnel from the Cuban Embassy in that country.

    • Operation Epic Fury / Operation Roaring Lion | Operation True Promise 4

  • Transcript: Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Gen. Dan Caine Hold a Press Briefing DoD 04 Mar 2026
  • Four Days In, Hegseth, Caine Say U.S. Making Decisive Progress in Iran DoD News 04 Mar 2026 -- During the War Department's second press conference since the U.S. and Israel's launch of Operation Epic Fury against the Iranian regime Feb. 28, Secretary of War Pete Hegseth and Air Force Gen. Dan Caine, chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, today said America is making decisive offensive progress in the conflict.
  • Scrutiny mounts over Trump's Iran war amid contradictory claims, soaring costs: Reports Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- The Trump administration is reportedly facing mounting scrutiny over its rapidly escalating war with Iran, as contradictory explanations for the initial strikes and the soaring financial toll raise alarms in Congress and among US allies.
  • US Confirms Sinking Iranian Ship, Says Tehran Firing Fewer Missiles RFE/RL 04 Mar 2026 -- Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth confirmed a US submarine sank ‌an Iranian warship off the coast of Sri Lanka as military officials said Iran is firing fewer missiles at targets around the Gulf region due to its decimated capabilities to wage war.
  • Over 50,000 Troops Participating in US Operation Against Iran - US Central Command Sputnik 04 Mar 2026 -- More than 50,000 troops and 200 fighter jets are participating in the US operation against Iran, with additional forces expected to arrive soon, US Central Command chief Admiral Brad Cooper said.
  • US, Israel Vow No Letup And 'A Lot Of Hurt' As Campaign Against Iran Intensifies RFE/RL 04 Mar 2026 -- The United States and Israel vowed no letup in their military campaign against Iran, with Tel Aviv launching a fresh "broad wave of strikes" while US President Donald Trump said Tehran "is going to be in for a lot of hurt" in the coming days.

  • IRGC announces 'blinding' US, Israel's eye in region; vows harsher retaliation coming Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced staging the 17th stage of its ongoing Operation True Promise 4 against Israeli and American targets throughout the region.
  • IRGC pounds bases of anti-Iran terrorist groups in Iraqi Kurdistan Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) carried out a wave of missile and drone strikes against the main bastions and headquarters of the anti-Iran terrorist groups in the semi-autonomous Kurdistan region of northern Iraq.
  • IRGC says dismantled US radar in Qatar, attacked destroyer in Indian Ocean Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) on Wednesday announced it had destroyed a strategic US radar system in Qatar and struck an American naval destroyer in the Indian Ocean in a continuation of retaliatory operations.
  • IRGC Ground Force launches 3 major operations in response to Israeli-US aggression Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- The Ground Force of the Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has responded to the Israeli-US aggression against Iran with 3 major operations.
  • 'Powerful strike': IRGC hits US destroyer with ballistic, strategic cruise missiles in Indian Ocean Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- The Islamic Revolution Guards Corps (IRGC) has announced striking an American destroyer in the Indian Ocean, hundreds of kilometers away from Iran's borders.
  • Drone-related fire near U.S. consulate in Dubai extinguished, no injuries reported People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- Authorities in Dubai said Tuesday that they have extinguished a limited fire near the U.S. consulate caused by a drone targeting incident earlier in the day.
  • Defense Ministry Spokesperson: Two Cruise Missiles Intercepted and Destroyed in Al-Kharj SPA 04 Mar 2026 -- Official Spokesperson for the Ministry of Defense Major General Turki Al-Maliki stated that two cruise missiles were intercepted and destroyed in Al-Kharj Governorate

  • Chairman Crawford Speaks Against Democrat Efforts to Restrict President Trump's Ability to Protect the American People US House of Representatives Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence 04 Mar 2026 -- House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence Chairman Rick Crawford (AR-01) joined House Foreign Affairs Committee Chairman Brian Mast (FL-21) to speak against H. Con. Res. 36, which would hamper President Trump's ability to protect Americans from a nuclear Iranian regime.
  • A New Front In Iran War? US Considers Arming Iranian Kurdish Opposition Groups RFE/RL 04 Mar 2026 -- The United States is considering arming Iranian Kurdish opposition groups based in neighboring Iraq, according to reports, in a move that could open a new front in the war on Iran and risks igniting a civil war in the Middle East country.
  • CIA planning to arm Kurdish militants to cause unrest in Iran after US failure in war: Report Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- The Central Intelligence Agency (CIA) intends to arm Kurdish militants in a bid to trigger a civil war in Iran after the United States failed to achieve its goals in the unprovoked war against the Islamic Republic, a report says.
  • Witkoff undermined Iran talks by peddling lies to build case for military aggression: Report Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- US President Donald Trump's special envoy to West Asia, Steve Witkoff, undermined the negotiations with Iran by peddling lies to build a case for military aggression, according to a report citing regional diplomats.
  • No imminent threat, just Israeli agenda: US senators push back on war on Iran Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- Two US senators have rebuked US President Donald Trump's decision to launch an aggression against Iran, saying there has been "no imminent threat" from Tehran and that the war is the agenda of the Israeli regime.
  • US Threatens to Launch Ground Operation in Iran Sputnik 04 Mar 2026 -- "I am more fearful than ever after this briefing that we may be putting boots on the ground" in Iran, Democratic Senator Richard Blumenthal told reporters, referencing a closed-door White House meeting.
  • Trump says U.S. will escort oil tankers through Strait of Hormuz if necessary People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- U.S. President Donald Trump said Tuesday that the U.S. Navy will begin escorting tankers through the Strait of Hormuz if necessary.

  • Iran's FM accuses Trump of betraying diplomacy with strikes during talks People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Foreign Minister Seyed Abbas Araghchi on Wednesday accused U.S. President Donald Trump of betraying both diplomacy and the American people by bombing the negotiating table amid nuclear talks.
  • US-Israeli aggression left Tehran with no choice but to defend Itself: Pezeshkian Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- President Masoud Pezeshkian of Iran has sent a message to regional countries, saying that the massive American-Zionist aggression has forced Iran into a position of total self-defense while respecting the sovereignty of regional nations.
  • Iran warns all Israeli embassies 'legitimate targets' if Lebanon embassy attacked Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- Iran has warned that all Israeli embassies worldwide will be legitimate targets if its diplomatic mission or representatives in Lebanon are hit by the regime.
  • FM Araghchi: Trump betrayed diplomacy, Americans by attacking Iran Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- Iran's Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi says US President Donald Trump betrayed both the indirect negotiations with Tehran and the American people by launching unprovoked aggression against Iran.
  • The Administrator, The Wild Card, The Heir: The Clerics Vying For Iran's Top Job RFE/RL 04 Mar 2026 -- For the first time in 36 years, Iran finds itself having to pick a new supreme leader.
  • Iran to hold massive public funeral for 'Martyr Leader' Imam Khamenei Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- A major public farewell ceremony is being arranged for the late Leader of the Islamic Revolution, Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei.

  • Imprisoned Iranian protesters face 'expedited' executions UN News 04 Mar 2026 -- As US, Israeli and Iranian strikes continued for a fifth day, a top Human Rights Council probe warned on Wednesday that Iranian prisoners including detained protesters face expedited death penalty proceedings.
  • Iran: Children must never be collateral damage, UN committee says OHCHR 04 Mar 2026 -- The UN Committee on the Rights of the Child is deeply disturbed by the loss of innocent children's lives and is gravely concerned about the escalating violence across the Middle East and its severe impact on children.
  • Iran: UN experts call for de-escalation and accountability OHCHR 04 Mar 2026 -- UN human rights experts* today condemned the unlawful military attacks launched by the United States of America and Israel against Iran.

  • No country has the right to dominate international affairs, dictate the destiny of other countries, or monopolize development advantages: NPC spokesperson responding to Iran-related question Global Times 04 Mar 2026 -- The National People's Congress (NPC), China's national legislature, held a press conference on Wednesday at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing, one day ahead of the opening of its annual session. Lou Qinjian, spokesperson for the fourth session of the 14th NPC, briefed the press on the session.

  • Ministry of Defense Spokesperson: Attempted Drone Attack Targeted Ras Tanura Refinery, No Damage Reported SPA 04 Mar 2026 -- Ministry of Defense Spokesperson Major General Turki Al-Maliki stated that an attempted attack targeted the Ras Tanura refinery, and preliminary assessments indicate the attack was carried out by a drone, resulting in no damage

  • Statements by the Government Spokesman of the Republic of Cyprus after the meeting of the National Security Council, 4 March 2026 Republic of Cyprus 04 Mar 2026 -- The Government Spokesman of the Republic of Cyprus, Mr Konstantinos Letymbiotis, called for patience and calm in statements made following the National Security council meeting today, 4 March 2026, at the Presidential Palace.
  • 5 Arab countries warn against regional escalation People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- The foreign ministers of Egypt, Saudi Arabia, the United Arab Emirates, Oman, and Syria held separate phone consultations Wednesday to warn against expanding ongoing regional tensions in the wake of the U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran, the Egyptian Foreign Ministry announced.
  • ASEAN foreign ministers call for peaceful means in addressing Middle East conflict People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- The foreign ministers of the Association of Southeast Asian Nations (ASEAN) on Wednesday called for an immediate cessation of hostilities in the Middle East.
  • Kallas Says Iranian Capacity To Target Gulf States 'Unsustainable' RFE/RL 04 Mar 2026 -- EU foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas says she doubts Iran's capacity to sustain its pace of attacks on countries across the Middle East given its decimated military following the 12-day war last year with Israel and the current US-Israeli campaign launched against it over the weekend.

  • President Discussed the Situation in the Middle East and the Gulf Region with the King of Jordan President of Ukraine 04 Mar 2026

  • OIC General Secretariat expresses its denunciation of the attempt to target the Republic of Türkiye with an Iranian ballistic missile Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) 04 Mar 2026 -- The General Secretariat of the Organization of Islamic Cooperation (OIC) expresses its denunciation of the attempt to target the Republic of Türkiye with a ballistic missile launched from Iran
  • Belarusian president meets Iranian ambassador, calls for peace in Middle East People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko met with Iranian Ambassador to Belarus Alireza Sanei here on Wednesday.
  • Lukashenko Calls Treacherous Attack by Israel With US Support on Iran Unacceptable Sputnik 04 Mar 2026 -- The treacherous attack by Israel with the US's support on Iran is unacceptable, Belarusian President Alexander Lukashenko said on Wednesday.
  • Spanish PM calls for peace in Iran, rejects Trump's trade threats People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- Spanish Prime Minister Pedro Sanchez on Wednesday called for peace amid the widening conflict involving the United States, Israel and Iran, and rejected U.S. threats after refusing to allow American bases on Spanish territory to be used in the fighting.
  • Summoning of the Iranian Ambassador to the United Kingdom: FCDO statement UK FCDO 04 Mar 2026 -- The Foreign, Commonwealth and Development Office has today summoned the Ambassador of the Islamic Republic of Iran to the United Kingdom.
  • Iraq won't allow terror groups to cross border into Iran: Security official Press TV 04 Mar 2026 -- The Iraqi national security advisor said that the country will not allow any groups based in the Iraqi soil to cross the border into Iran to carry out acts of terror, especially as the Islamic Republic is fighting off the US-Israeli aggression.
  • Japan-Qatar Foreign Ministers' Telephone Talk Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Japan 04 Mar 2026
  • What to know about world reactions to U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran? People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- As U.S.-Israeli strikes on Iran entered their fourth day, global reactions remained sharply divided, with some condemning the initial strikes, others criticizing Iran's retaliatory actions, and many urging de-escalation.
  • France cannot approve military actions by U.S., Israel: Macron People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- French President Emmanuel Macron said Tuesday that the military operations launched by the United States and Israel were conducted "outside international law" and could not be approved by France.

  • Nathan Sales: Success In Iran Will Be Measured By Pace Of Decline In Iranian Attacks RFE/RL 04 Mar 2026 -- Washington's objectives in the war with Iran are both military and political, including neutralizing the threat Tehran poses to the United States and its allies and creating conditions for political change inside the country, according to Nathan Sales, a former U.S. ambassador-at-large and coordinator for counterterrorism who is now a distinguished fellow with the Atlantic Council's Middle East Programs.

Defense Policy / Programs

  • War Of Words: How US Military Operations Are Named RFE/RL 04 Mar 2026 -- As US military operation names go, Epic Fury marks a break from tradition.
  • Department of War Invests $27M for the Domestic Excavation, Extraction, Processing, and Refinement of Antimony DoD 04 Mar 2026 -- The Department of War announced today a February 24, 2026, investment of $27 million in Defense Production Act (DPA) Title III funds to U.S. Antimony Corporation (USAC) for the domestic extraction, processing, and refinement of antimony.
  • Washington Guard, Thailand Partners train through Cobra Gold 2026 Army News 04 Mar 2026 -- When a disaster happens and lives are in danger, time might be the most critical asset first responders have.
  • U.S. Coast Guard Announces New Training Center in Alabama DHS 04 Mar 2026 -- The Department of Homeland Security (DHS) and the United States Coast Guard announced that its newest training center that will be opening in the state of Alabama.
  • Keel Laid for Future USS Philadelphia US Navy 04 Mar 2026 -- The keel for the future USS Philadelphia (LPD 32), a San Antonio class-amphibious transport dock ship, was authenticated at HII's Ingalls Shipbuilding division, March 3.
  • Japan, U.S. forces conduct Fleet Synthetic Training Joint 26-71 US Navy 04 Mar 2026 -- Japan Self-Defense Forces and U.S. forces conducted Fleet Synthetic Training Joint (FST-J) 26-71 at Commander, Fleet Activities Yokosuka and command centers across the region Feb. 23-27, 2026.
  • GT 255: ICBM test launch verifies multiple reentry vehicles, system reliability United States Space Force 04 Mar 2026 -- Air Force Global Strike Command conducted a test launch of an unarmed Minuteman III intercontinental ballistic missile equipped with two test re-entry vehicles March 3, at 11:01 p.m. Pacific Time from Vandenberg Space Force Base.
  • US Space Force University Consortium awards new tech institutes, spotlights major transition successes United States Space Force 04 Mar 2026 -- The United States Space Force, in collaboration with the Air Force Research Laboratory, has awarded cooperative agreements to two university-led teams for advanced remote sensing research under the Space Strategic Technology Institute 4.

  • Dynamic Guard strengthens NATO electronic warfare capabilities in the Norwegian Sea NATO Allied Maritime Command 04 Mar 2026 -- NATO placed electronic warfare (EW) at the forefront of maritime operations during Exercise Dynamic Guard, which took place in the challenging environment of the Norwegian Sea. The annual exercise trains Allied forces to operate in a complex and contested electromagnetic environment.

  • Air Defenses Add To Evidence Of Russian Oreshnik Missile Deployment In Belarus RFE/RL 04 Mar 2026 -- Several air defense and electronic warfare installations appear to have cropped up around a site in Belarus where Russia may have deployed a nuclear-capable, hypersonic missile system called Oreshnik, recent satellite imagery indicates.
  • Nuclear Deterrence Remains Cornerstone of Global Security - Kremlin Sputnik 04 Mar 2026 -- The negotiations on strategic stability should include the participation of Europe's nuclear powers, the Kremlin spokesman Dmitry Peskov said.

  • Belgium Delivered None of 30 F-16s Pledged to Ukraine in 2024 - Air Force Chief Sputnik 04 Mar 2026 -- Belgium has given Ukraine none of the 30 F-16 fighter jets it promised back in 2024 due to delays in F-35 deliveries, Belgian Air Force Commander Geert De Decker said, citing the need to maintain air force capabilities.

  • Investing in the future of Navy's Anzac-class ships Australia DOD 04 Mar 2026 -- Defence is supporting critical maritime capabilities for the Royal Australian Navy by investing $163 million in a new seven-year contract with BAE Systems Australia.
  • Parliament passes legislation to establish Defence committee Australia DOD 04 Mar 2026 -- The Albanese Government has passed legislation in the Parliament which will establish the Parliamentary Joint Committee on Defence (PJCD).
  • Warramunga strengthens ties in India Australia DOD 04 Mar 2026 -- HMAS Warramunga recently participated in the Indian Navy's International Fleet Review (IFR), as well as the multilateral Exercise Milan in the Bay of Bengal.

Sweden demonstrated both strong defence capabilities and innovative power when one of NATO's top commanders visited the country. - Sweden is a good example within the Alliance when it comes to the ability to challenge itself and continuously raise the bar, says SACT (Supreme Allied Commander Transformation), Admiral Pierre Vandier.

  • NSC confirms espionage, 'foreign-directed malign activities' in PH Philippine News Agency 04 Mar 2026 -- The National Security Council (NSC) on Wednesday night confirmed media reports that Philippine authorities have uncovered a "serious national security matter" regarding the alleged involvement of Filipino nationals in "espionage and foreign-directed malign activities" linked to the People's Republic of China.

  • China, U.S. should respect each other, pursue peaceful coexistence and win-win cooperation: spokesperson People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- As two major countries, China and the United States should respect each other, and pursue peaceful coexistence and win-win cooperation, a Chinese spokesperson said on Wednesday.
  • China's central authorities to roll out more favorable policies for Hong Kong: spokesperson People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- Chinese central authorities will continue rolling out more policies and measures that benefit the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region during the 15th Five-Year Plan period (2026-2030), a spokesperson said on Wednesday.

  • Mainland spokesperson responds to concerns in Taiwan that after US-Israeli strikes on Iran, mainland might follow suit and take action against island Global Times 04 Mar 2026 -- In response to a question that the US and Israel recently launched military strikes against Iran, with some public opinion in Taiwan expressing concern that the mainland might follow the US approach in taking action against Taiwan, while other commentators said Washington's use of force globally could make the mainland more cautious about using force against Taiwan, Zhang Han, spokeswoman for the State Council Taiwan Affairs Office said when and by what means to solve the Taiwan question is entirely the Chinese people's own business and brooks no external interference.
  • DPP urged to lift restrictions on cross-Strait exchanges People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- A Chinese mainland spokesperson on Wednesday urged the Democratic Progressive Party (DPP) authorities in Taiwan to lift restrictions on exchanges across the Taiwan Strait, including tourism, in the interests of the people of Taiwan.
  • DPP authorities will end up as 'fish on the chopping board' and a 'cash machine': Taiwan Affairs Office on reported Trump remarks about Taiwan chip industry Global Times 04 Mar 2026
  • Chinese people never allow external interference in China's internal affairs: spokesperson People's Daily 04 Mar 2026 -- The Chinese people will never allow any external forces to interfere in China's internal affairs, and will resolutely safeguard national sovereignty, unity and territorial integrity, a spokesperson said on Wednesday.

  • EU Statement on Agenda item 5(b): Application of safeguards in the Democratic People's Republic of Korea European External Action Service (EEAS) 04 Mar 2026
  • Decision of SPA Standing Committee of DPRK KCNA 04 Mar 2026 -- The Standing Committee of the Supreme People's Assembly of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea announced its decision on holding the election of deputies to the SPA of the DPRK.
  • Decision of Standing Committee of DPRK SPA KCNA 04 Mar 2026 -- A central election committee was organized for the election of deputies to the 15th Supreme People's Assembly of the Democratic People's Republic of Korea.

  • EU Statement on Agenda item 5(c): Implementation of the NPT safeguards agreement in the Syrian Arab Republic European External Action Service (EEAS) 04 Mar 2026

  • Press release on Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov's telephone conversation with Deputy Prime Minister and Foreign Minister of the Republic of Iraq Fuad Hussein Russia Ministry of Foreign Affairs 04 Mar 2026

  • Prime Minister Carney delivers remarks to media in Sydney, Australia Prime Minister of Canada 04 Mar 2026

  • Press conference of the Federal Chancellor after the meeting with US President Trump - Difficult times call for strong partnerships Germany - Federal Government 04 Mar 2026

  • Secretary Rubio's Call with Turkish Foreign Minister Fidan US Dept. of State 04 Mar 2026
  • "We have repeatedly shown what kind of a nation we are when our homeland is threatened" Presidency of The Republic of Turkey 04 Mar 2026 -- Speaking at an iftar dinner with Turkish soldiers, President Erdoğan said: "Throughout our thousand-year history on these lands, we have repeatedly shown what kind of a nation we are when our homeland, flag, independence and sacred vales are threatened, when our independence and future encounter a danger."

  • House panel declares impeach raps vs. VP Sara sufficient in substance Philippine News Agency 04 Mar 2026 -- The House Committee on Justice on Wednesday declared the two remaining impeachment complaints against Vice President Sara Duterte sufficient in substance.

  • Iran War Sends Economic Ripples Through Central Asia, Turkmenistan Most Exposed RFE/RL 04 Mar 2026 -- Balkan, in western Turkmenistan along the Iranian border, is one of the first regions to feel any disruption in trade from Iran. Residents there are reliant on imported goods arriving daily from nearby crossings, so even minor delays or price changes in Iranian shipments are immediately noticeable in local markets.

  • World News in Brief: Afghan-Pakistan border clashes latest, murder of Iraqi women's rights activist condemned, Chile leprosy milestone UN News 04 Mar 2026 -- Clashes along the Afghanistan-Pakistan border have continued for a seventh straight day, with humanitarian access to affected areas still restricted, the UN said on Wednesday.
